full_text:
Shi Wei (Gongcao)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Wei, styledGongcao, was born in Nanjun in Jingzhou. An upright man and scholar, served Sun Xiu but rejected Sun Hao and Sima Yan due to health. Shi Wei was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Shi Wei lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
